---
title: "Week 8"
subtitle: "Disaggregate Demand Theory"
---

## Prepare

📖 Watch the [videos](/teaching/ENCI707/prep/week8/week8-videos.html)

## Participate

📋 [AE 4 - Trip Distribution](/teaching/CIVE461/ae/ae-4-trip-distribution.html) - Submit on Canvas

## Practice

None

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
